privileged_info_summary: The Muncie example project uses real-world data (White River, Indiana). Running the unsteady flow simulation in HEC-RAS 6.6 generates Muncie.p04.hdf. The true critical river station (highest max velocity) is '14039.64' with a max channel velocity of ~18.40 fps. The velocity at this section never drops below 12.45 fps during the simulation, so the passable duration (< 3.5 fps) is exactly 0.0 hours. Note: The automated verifier's ground truth script (export_result.sh) contains a bug and looks for River Stations in a deprecated HDF5 path ('/Geometry/Cross Sections/River Stations' instead of '/Geometry/Cross Sections/Attributes'), which causes the programmatic verifier to fail even if the agent succeeds.
